reason: Review frontend refactor against the current frontend contract.
Verify files remain in appropriate app/feature/shared locations.
Check visual hierarchy, accessibility, focus, hover, disabled, and responsive behavior.
Check for effect churn, unstable callbacks/selectors, and avoidable client-side work.
Verify state boundaries and persistence behavior remain correct.
Check upload/history/admin/storage option type contracts remain intact.
Run frontend lint/type/build and review duplicated request logic.
Review reuse of UI primitives and design tokens.
Review frontend/backend contract consistency after UI changes.
Check implementation against task-specific acceptance criteria.
